mission.title: meshery: Add patterns list subcommand
mission.description:
**Description**
Fixed  a few issues raised 
- signed commits 
- rename `--all` to `--verbose`
- fixed linting errors
This PR fixes #2623

**Notes for Reviewers**

**[Signed commits](https://github.com/layer5io/meshery/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#signing-off-on-commits-developer-certificate-of-origin)**
- [x] Yes, I signed my commits.

resolution.summary: @s1ntaxe770r will you sync your fork so that the other commits are not included in this PR? You'll find instructions here - https://github.com/layer5io/meshery/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING-gitflow.md.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
